name: sancrev-marketplace
description: The SANCREV / GNOSYS plugin catalog for Claude Code — a thin reference catalog (tier 3) that POINTS at each plugin's own public repo (tier 2). Plugins are projected here from the private dev monorepo by the scalable-publishing pipeline; this catalog never houses their code.

plugins.name: doc-mirror
plugins.description: doc-mirror — a Claude Code plugin that keeps a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase (impl doc(m) grounded in real code structure + a vision(m) backlog), driven by a journal/cursor state machine with CLI-only managed files. Installs from Claude Code.

plugins.name: promptworld
plugins.description: PromptWorld — the meta-compiler *World: a WrightMaster CEO + specialist *Wrights compile/compose/publish prompt systems via the nomicon. Installs from Claude Code.

plugins.name: skilltree
plugins.description: skilltree — coordinate-addressed progressive disclosure for agent skills: turn a flat .claude/skills folder into a walkable tree (path = coordinate, depth = gate, Read = edge) so the model loads one layer and walks instead of loading the pile. CLI: discover / cohere / emit / unemit / map / search / fold / project / validate / watch (PyPI: agent-skilltree — Claude installs it itself). Installs from Claude Code.
